{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans 'Playground' %}

{% trans 'This playground is designed to assist you in creating alerts for any' %} IsAlgo {% trans 'strategy or indicator. Simply follow the steps below to configure your alerts.' %} {% comment %}
If you’re using a strategy or indicator from an external source, click here for detailed instructions on how to set up your alerts. {% endcomment %}

{% trans 'Preparation Checklist:' %}

  • {% trans 'Ensure you are on the correct chart with the desired asset and timeframe.' %}
  • {% trans "Add the strategy/indicator to the chart and confirm it's the tested setup." %}
  • {% trans 'Test your strategy/indicator to verify its performance before proceeding.' %}

{% trans "Ensure you thoroughly test the strategy or indicator you plan to automate before initiating the automation process." as test_info %} {% include 'include/infos.html' with info=test_info %}

{% trans 'Alert Messages:' %}

{% trans 'The alert messages are the message that will be sent on every action taken by the strategy/indicator, whether closing or opening a trade.' %}

{% trans 'By default the alerts will have the asset name of the tradingview chart and the volume that you set in the strategy/indicator, but you can override them.' %}

{% trans 'leave empty to use strategy-defined asset' %}
{% trans 'leave empty to use strategy-defined volume' %}

  • {% trans 'Long Entry:' %} D=Buy A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} V={{ "{{qty}" }}} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}}
  • {% trans 'Short Entry:' %} D=Sell A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} V={{ "{{qty}" }}} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}}
  • {% trans 'Long Exit:' %} X=Buy A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} P={{ "{{partial_close}" }}} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}}
  • {% trans 'Short Exit:' %} X=Sell A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} P={{ "{{partial_close}" }}} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}}

{% trans 'Alert Parameters:' %}

{% trans 'Using Placeholders:' %} {% trans 'You can use TradingView placeholders' %} (e.g., {{ "{{ticker}" }}}, {{ "{{qty}" }}}) {% trans 'to dynamically pull values from your strategy/indicator, or use static values' %} (e.g., A=BTCUSD, V=10) {% trans 'to override them.' %}

{% trans 'Required Parameters:' %}

  • D {% trans "or" %} X - {% trans "Action:" %} D=Buy/Sell {% trans "for Entry," %} X=Buy/Sell {% trans "for Exit" %}
  • A - {% trans "Asset: Use" %} A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} {% trans "for strategy asset or" %} A=BTCUSD {% trans "for custom" %}
  • ID - {% trans "Unique identifier: Use" %} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}}
  • V {% trans "or" %} Q - {% trans "Volume: Use" %} V={{ "{{qty}" }}} {% trans "for strategy volume or" %} V=10 {% trans "for custom" %}

{% trans 'Optional Parameters:' %}

  • P - {% trans "Partial close: Use" %} P={{ "{{partial_close}" }}} {% trans "or" %} P=50 ({% trans "can include % like" %} P=50%)
    • {% comment %}
  • R - Reverse signal: Closes any open trade before opening a new one in the opposite direction. This parameter must be added to both entry and exit alerts to work correctly.
    Example: D=Buy A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} V=10 ID={{ "{{ID}" }}} R=1 and X=Buy A={{ "{{ticker}" }}} P={{ "{{partial_close}" }}} ID={{ "{{ID}" }}} R=1
    Change R value if you're using multiple strategies on the same asset to a unique number for each strategy (e.g., R=1, R=2, R=3).
    • {% endcomment %}

{% trans 'Volume Options:' %}

  • {% trans "Strategy volume:" %} V={{ "{{qty}" }}}
  • {% trans "Static value:" %} V=10
  • {% trans "Math expressions:" %} V={{ "{{qty}" }}}*2 {% trans "or" %} V={{ "{{qty}" }}}/10
  • {% trans "Rounding:" %} V={{ "{{qty}" }}}%2 ({% trans "rounds to 2 decimal places" %})

{% trans "Copy and paste these alerts into the strategy/indicator's Alerts section in the settings and click OK." %}

{% trans 'After setting up the alert messages in the strategy/indicator the last step is to create the alert,' %} {% trans 'Click here' %} {% trans 'to see how.' %}

{% trans "When changing the asset or volume settings, there is no need to add a new account. Each account, once added can handle all available assets and volumes." as volume_info %} {% include 'include/infos.html' with info=volume_info %}
{% comment %}

{% trans 'Need help?' %}

If you encounter any issues during the integration process, our support team is here to help. Contact us here.

{% endcomment %}
